title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host sheds light on the various customs and traditions followed by people across various states of India.

title: Paramavtaar Shree Krishna
desc: The show follows Krishna from birth to Dwarka, his battles and miracles, his love with gopis, and his role in Mahabharata, ending with Bhagavad G

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Paramavtaar Shree Krishna
desc: The show follows Krishna from birth to Dwarka, his battles and miracles, his love with gopis, and his role in Mahabharata, ending with Bhagavad G

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's sisters, Preeta and Srishti, find their own paths. They face both troubles and joys together. Their lives are full of surprises and challenges as they navigate their destinies.

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Raghav reprimands Viren's friend for his rude behaviour towards Reet. Later, when Reet asks Raghav a question, he gives a name to their relationship.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Reet, a sharp journalist, and Raghav, a moody man, marry under the traditional 'Aata Sata' custom out of love for siblings. Can obligation become genuine love?

title: Vasudha
desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

title: Vasudha
desc: Vasudha, a Mumbai fashion writer and photographer, learns her husband's affair; urged to explore freedom, she befriends Nihar, daughter's artist friend, reshaping life and love.

title: Meet
desc: Whether it be employment or an unexpected marriage to her namesake, the tomboyish and fun-loving Meet challenges social conventions and gender roles every step of the way.

title: Meet
desc: A touching narrative of family bonds, personal growth, and everyday challenges, showing how two individuals learn to navigate life's pressures while holding onto hope and responsibility.

title: Meet
desc: A touching narrative of family bonds, personal growth, and everyday challenges, showing how two individuals learn to navigate life's pressures while holding onto hope and responsibility.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: Sheetal tries and fails to win over Shaurya, while Mehek's returning family members are stunned to find him in their home.

title: Zindagi Ki Mahek
desc: Mehek Sharma is a cook who decides to enter a cooking competition. Her life takes a turn after she meets Shaurya, a judge of the competition.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Parv threatens to arrest Kaushalya for stealing the money unless she gets Guddan married to AJ, to which Kaushalya readily agrees. Soon, Guddan dances with the troupe but is out of synchronization.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Choti Guddan, who wants to revive her father, AJ's, restaurant, crosses path with Pushpa Birla who aims to destroy the former by any means, including using her own son Agastya for her evil purposes.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Prarthana and Raunak meet by fate. She marries into a rich family but faces struggles. Prarthana works hard to save her marriage and secure her future, overcoming obstacles with determination.

title: Bhagya Laxmi

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
desc: Malishka defiantly refuses to leave, asserting her claim as Rishi's future wife. Further, she boldly declares she is pregnant with Rishi's child.

desc: Rishi blames Lakshmi for an accident, and she leaves with their daughter. Years later, their children meet, bringing Rishi and Lakshmi back into each other's lives.

title: Jodha Akbar
desc: Jodha-Akbar tells of a sixteenth-century political marriage between Emperor Akbar and Rajput princess Jodha Bai. Though political, their union grows into love and changes history.
